riddle: I have keys, but open no locks. I have space, but no rooms. You can enter, but you cannot go inside. What am I?
hint: You may be resting your hands on the answer at this very moment.
wrongAnswerResponses: Mm. No. Think on the tools of your own trade, traveler.
Wrong — though I admire the confidence. Look closer to hand.
Not even warm. The answer is nearer than you think. Much nearer.
